contents.text: The necromancer overwhelms his opponents with a variety of summons.

Landing a killing blow will create an undead summon at the victim's location. Summons warp to the necromancer if they are over 25 blocks away. Undead summons have 40 HP, are immune to fire, and deal 7 damage.

tooltip.text:
Cost - 200 Siege Bucks
A 2-pack of bones that can be thrown at enemies.
The bones deal 5 damage and heal you 2 HP on hit.
Can have a maximum of 4 at once.

Cost - 300 Siege Bucks
A single use item that can be dropped on an enemy summon to convert it to your team.

Cost - 600 Siege Bucks
Calls all of your team's summons within 25 blocks to your location.
Can be used every 45s.

Cost - 500 Siege Bucks
When used, counts the amount of damage taken by yourself and teammates within 10 blocks.
After 5s, gives you and teammates within 10 blocks armor equal to 20% of the total damage taken.
Also gives 2 extra protection levels if the total damage taken is over 20
The additional defense lasts 6s.
Can be used every 30s.

Cost - 700 Siege Bucks
Summons a powerful spider to aid you in combat.
The spider has a large amount of health, deals a moderate amount of damage, and poisons enemies.
Enemies that die to the spider release a pack of 4 cave spiders that have low health, deal low damage, and poison enemies.
Can only have 1 spider active and in your inventory at once.

Cost - 450 Siege Bucks
Warps you to the closest undead summon or Broodmother Spider within 15 blocks.
The teleport leaves behind a weak undead summon.
Warping again will not teleport you to this summon.
Can be used every 15s.

Cost - 2000 Siege Bucks
Undead summons have their HP increased from 40 to 50 and their attack damage from 7 to 9. Increases the HP restored with the necro staff from 15 to 20.
Returns you to the main menu.
